steps.title: Set up the equation using a point from the table
steps.content:
Take the point $(10, 82)$ from the first row. Substitute $x = 10$ and $f(x) = 82$ into the given equation $f(x) = mx - 28$:
$$82 = m(10) - 28$$

steps.title: Solve for m by isolating the variable
steps.content:
Add 28 to both sides:
$$82 + 28 = 10m$$
$$110 = 10m$$
Divide both sides by 10:
$$m = 11$$
